lime.usage: Highlights only: passed-state nav dots, copy-success feedback, rare sticker accents.

sky.usage: Decorative touches only: launch map stickers, bottom-nav tinting.

rose.usage: Testimonial sticker fills and rare decorative circles.

yellow.usage: Status only: pricing badges, copy-in-progress feedback. Never as section background.

warm-dark.usage: Borders, grid lines, shadow color base. Never used for text.

warm-darker.usage: Emphasis borders, sticker shadows, interactive outlines.

surface-pale.usage: Pill backgrounds, icon wells, progress tracks, FAQ items, side-tab panels.

display.purpose: Hero brand statements only. Never outside the first viewport.

panel.purpose: Inside service panels and showcase moments.

title.purpose: Compact titles on process cards, work meta, pricing names.

label.purpose: Kickers, stickers, badges, nav dots, section markers.

shadows.name: workshop-shadow-xs
shadows.purpose: Small decorative elements: nav dots, badges, small stickers.

shadows.name: workshop-shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Default decorative shadow for buttons and pills.

shadows.name: workshop-shadow-xl
shadows.purpose: Testimonial cards and service stack panel.

shadows.name: ambient-lift
shadows.purpose: Soft blurred shadow for hover states on interactive elements.

shadows.name: deep-stack
shadows.purpose: Combined ambient and workshop shadow for thick substantial objects.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: The main call to action. Pill-shaped, orange, sticker shadow.
components.css: .primaryAction { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 0 20px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(56% 0.20 45); color: oklch(98% 0.01 45); font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.16); box-shadow: 5px 5px 4px oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.10); transition: transform 280ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.38, 1), background-color 280ms; } .primaryAction:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: oklch(52% 0.18 45); } .primaryAction:active { translate: 0 1px; scale: 0.985; }

components.name: Process Card
components.description: Stacked card for multi-step process. Scroll-driven stack-to-spread choreography.
components.html:
Discovery

A 30-min call to understand your business goals.
components.css: .processCard { width: min(82%, 720px); min-height: 260px; border: 2px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.14); border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(98% 0.028 94); box-shadow: 10px 10px 4px oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.12); } .processCard:nth-child(2) { background: oklch(95% 0.08 210); } .processCard:nth-child(3) { background: oklch(96% 0.07 350); } .processCard:nth-child(4) { background: oklch(94% 0.08 88); } .processIcon { background: oklch(56% 0.20 45); color: oklch(98% 0.01 45); box-shadow: 3px 3px 4px oklch(28% 0.02 45 / 0.08); }

components.name: Testimonial Card
components.description: Stacked proof card with scroll-driven deck choreography.
components.html:
01

Akhil Lodha

Made the offer easier to choose

They dug into what clients ask before they call.

Financial advisor
Prooffirst
components.css: .testimonialCard { border: 2px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.14); border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(94% 0.035 82); box-shadow: 12px 12px 4px oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.10); } .testimonialSticker { background: oklch(74% 0.13 350); } .testimonialCard.testimonialWarm { background: oklch(98% 0.028 94); } .testimonialCard.testimonialRose { background: oklch(96% 0.06 350); } .testimonialCard.testimonialMint { background: oklch(96% 0.055 210); }

components.name: Pricing Card
components.description: Pinned-proposal pricing card with slight rotation and decorative circle.
components.html:
Most Popular

Growth

₹85,000

For established businesses.

  • Custom design
  • Launch support
Get Started
components.css: .pricingCard { border: 2px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.12); border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(99% 0.012 75); box-shadow: 10px 10px 4px oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.10); } .featuredPricing { background: oklch(56% 0.20 45); color: oklch(98% 0.01 45); } .pricingBadge { background: oklch(86% 0.09 88); border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 3px 3px 4px oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.12); transform: rotate(-3deg); }

components.name: FAQ Accordion
components.description: Details-based accordion with sticker shadow and orange border on open.
components.html:
How long does a build take?

Most market-fit sites ship within 3-4 weeks.
components.css: .faqList details { border: 2px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.1); border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(99% 0.01 70); box-shadow: 5px 5px 4px oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.10); } .faqList details[open] { border-color: oklch(56% 0.20 45); box-shadow: 7px 7px 4px oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.10); } .faqSection { background: oklch(97% 0.026 94); border-top: 2px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.1); }

components.name: Copy Email Button
components.description: Pill-shaped clipboard button with state feedback (idle, copying, copied, failed).
components.css: .copyEmailButton { min-height: 42px; padding: 0 18px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(99% 0.01 70 / 0.9); color: oklch(15% 0.018 45); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800; border: 1px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.15); box-shadow: 4px 4px 4px oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.10); } .copyEmailButton[data-copy-state="copied"] { background: oklch(78% 0.14 132); } .copyEmailButton[data-copy-state="failed"] { background: oklch(74% 0.13 350); }

components.name: Launch Map
components.description: Desktop-only fixed route tracker at page bottom. Five stops with progress rail.
components.html:
RouteYour website story
  1. 01AboutWho for
components.css: .launchMap { border: 2px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.14); border-radius: 12px; background: repeating-linear-gradient(-6deg, oklch(99% 0.012 76) 0 11px, oklch(96% 0.035 88) 11px 12px); box-shadow: 8px 8px 4px oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.10); transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(-0.5deg); }

narrative.overview: Nexora Labs should feel like a calm expert team in an organized workshop. Tools are out but arranged, work is visible but not chaotic, and every detail shows intention. The system is warm, tactile, clear, and crafted with playful moments that feel earned, not overwhelming.
keyCharacteristics: Warm and inviting palette with committed orange
Muted accent colors used as rare highlights, not constant spatial actors
Tactile hierarchy via hybrid offset shadows (offset + small blur)
Typographic authority with bold geometric sans
Scroll-driven choreography at a calmer, more considered pace
Organized workshop layout rhythm, not generic section stacking

rules.name: The 10% Pop Rule
rules.body: The primary orange is a high-chroma tool meant for impact. Use it on no more than 10% of the interface surface.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are clean and flat by default. Shadows appear only as a response to state or as a deliberate workshop-shadow decorative choice.

rules.name: The No-Tracking Rule
rules.body: Letter spacing remains 0 for all headings and body text. Tracking is reserved exclusively for short uppercase labels.

rules.name: The Workshop-Shadow Only Rule
rules.body: The decorative shadow vocabulary is the hybrid offset shadow (offset + small 4px blur). Blurred shadows alone are reserved for ambient lift on interactive hover states.

dos: Do use OKLCH for all color declarations.
Do keep the palette warm, tinted, and brand-specific. Every neutral is hue-shifted toward 45.
Do make orange a committed brand signal, not a tiny accent.
Do use large type with real confidence. The display clamp reaches 8.2rem.
Do use the workshop-shadow pattern (offset + small blur) for tactile depth.
Do wrap body text at 65ch for legibility.
Do preserve reduced-motion support for all scroll choreography and entrance animations.
donts: Don't use pure #000 or #fff. Every neutral is tinted toward the brand hue.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use decorative glassmorphism (blurs and glass cards as default).
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent).
Don't repeat identical icon-card grids as the main structure.
Don't make the site look like a generic SaaS landing page.
Don't use standard SaaS blue or cold greys.
Don't use accent colors as section backgrounds or large color bands. They are highlights only.
Don't pack multiple sections into a single viewport. Give each section room.
